prompt: 使用 $aigc-video-review 审查 projects/aigc/<项目名>/13-画布/第1集/1-1-1.mp4，对照 10-分组真源、生成 prompt 和真实视频证据，输出审片报告但不要改上游文件。
expected: Route as local_single_video; load type, video evidence, review dimensions, review gate, and report template modules; require metadata, keyframes/contact sheet, observed_content_summary, method_selection, finding list, operation plan, and report path.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-video-review 审查 LibTV 画布链接 https://www.liblib.tv/canvas?projectId=<uuid> 中的视频 1-2-1，先下载真实视频，再判断 prompt 匹配和创作质量。
expected: Route as libtv_target; run N0 before review; load libtv-intake contract and libTV CLI skill/context; block verdict until project, node, remote query, download path, canonical video path, and real video evidence are available.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-video-review 对比 1-3-2-a.mp4 和 1-3-2-b.mp4，并参考我给的好示例和坏示例，选择候选片并说明是否需要重跑或修 10-分组。
expected: Route as local_variant_set plus example_calibration; lock example roles, extract observable dimensions, compare common and per-variant issues, choose selected and skipped methods, then output variant selection, landing, operation plan, and learning writeback decision.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-video-review 审查 1-4-1.mp4；如果确认是 10-分组提示过载导致，请直接修对应组，不要改无关分镜组。
expected: Route as authorized_repair_or_rerun; complete N3 evidence before repair; prove prompt_problem or group overload, limit patch scope to the target group and necessary adjacent transition, write report and changed_files, and pass patch-scope gates.
